checklist_rows.detail: The retained smoke run now stays tied to checkpoint family `swarm.local.open_adapter.policy:tailrun-home-admitted-20260328k` at pointer digest `dd1aa85c355eb43934a20afe7e4204b3ed82bb85f4fe392dfde45229f4e434f8` instead of relying on an implicit scratch path.
The Linux 4080 contribution row records observed wallclock 2945 ms, local execution 3 ms, 12 steps, and 4000.0 estimated steps/s.
The coordinator membership receipt records 21474836480 free bytes and 1 accelerator for the admitted Linux 4080 worker before the smoke run counts.

The smoke run now cites frequent-eval ledger row `psion.executor.4080.frequent_eval_row:tailrun-home-admitted-20260328k:dd1aa85c355eb43934a20afe7e4204b3ed82bb85f4fe392dfde45229f4e434f8` with operator-review suite status `green` and keeps missing or unscored suites as hard blockers instead of silent gaps.

The retained smoke run keeps unsupported-precision refusal `open adapter backend does not yet support precision policy `Bf16Mixed`` plus publish disposition `refused` and promotion disposition `held` explicit.

summary: The admitted 4080 lane now has one real smoke-run packet tied to retained run `tailrun-home-admitted-20260328k`. The smoke objective remains an executor-lane local-cluster admission surrogate on dataset `dataset://openagents/swarm/open_adapter_sft@2026.03.24` through the Linux 4080 contribution row (steps=12 observed_wallclock_ms=2945 estimated_steps_per_second=4000.0), while checkpoint pointer `dd1aa85c355eb43934a20afe7e4204b3ed82bb85f4fe392dfde45229f4e434f8` and frequent-eval ledger row `psion.executor.4080.frequent_eval_row:tailrun-home-admitted-20260328k:dd1aa85c355eb43934a20afe7e4204b3ed82bb85f4fe392dfde45229f4e434f8` keep checkpoint, eval, and blocker facts explicit instead of relying on launch-only infrastructure claims.
